name: Full-Stack Dev Team
description: End-to-end software development team covering requirements, implementation, review, and release

members.role: Lead Engineer вҖ” writes code, reviews PRs, and drives technical decisions
Product Owner вҖ” defines requirements, prioritizes backlog, and accepts deliverables
Release Engineer вҖ” manages CI/CD pipelines, infra, and production deployments

author: cerealskill
objective: End-to-end software development team covering requirements, implementation, review, and release
roster:
# ROSTER.md

## Team
Full-Stack Dev Team

## Objective
Deliver production-ready software features from requirements to deployment using a stage-gated pipeline. Each stage is owned by a specific team member and must pass before moving forward.

## Members

| Agent | Role | Responsibility |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `backend-engineer` | Lead Engineer | Writes, reviews, and refactors code; owns technical architecture decisions |
| `product-owner` | Product Owner | Writes specs and acceptance criteria; grooms backlog; signs off on deliverables |
| `platform-engineer` | Release Engineer | Manages CI/CD, infra provisioning, canary deployments, and rollbacks |

## Interaction Model

PO defines вҶ’ Dev implements вҶ’ SRE releases вҶ’ PO accepts.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Product Owner  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  Backend Engineer    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (product-owner) в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ (backend-engineer)   в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                     в”Ӯ PR merged
                                     v
                          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ  Platform Engineer   в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ (platform-engineer)  в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                     в”Ӯ deployed
                                     v
                          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ  Product Owner       в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ  (acceptance)        в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## When to use
- Building a new feature from scratch with clear ownership stages.
- Running a sprint where requirements, development, and ops are separate concerns.
- You need traceability from spec to production deploy.

## Use Cases
- **Feature sprint:** PO writes stories вҶ’ Dev implements вҶ’ SRE deploys to staging вҶ’ PO accepts вҶ’ SRE promotes to prod.
- **Bug fix:** Dev diagnoses and fixes вҶ’ SRE deploys hotfix вҶ’ PO confirms resolution.
- **Infra change:** SRE proposes вҶ’ Dev reviews impact вҶ’ SRE executes with PO sign-off.

## Rules
- No code ships without a passing CI run.
- PO acceptance is required before any production promotion.
- SRE is on-call for 24h after every deploy.
- Dev owns code reviewвҖ”no auto-merges without review.

name: On-Call Team
description: Automated incident response squad that detects, triages, and resolves production issues with minimal human intervention

members.role: Incident Commander вҖ” owns the incident lifecycle and coordinates the response
Data Watchdog вҖ” monitors data pipelines and external API health checks

author: cerealskill
objective: Automated incident response squad that detects, triages, and resolves production issues with minimal human intervention
roster:
# ROSTER.md

## Team
On-Call Team

## Objective
Detect, triage, and resolve production incidents automatically вҖ” escalating to humans only when necessary. This team runs 24/7 and follows a structured incident lifecycle to minimize MTTR.

## Members

| Agent | Role | Responsibility |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `incident-responder` | Incident Commander | Owns the incident lifecycle: declares, coordinates, delegates, and closes incidents |
| `flight-scraper` | Data Watchdog | Monitors external data sources, API health checks, and pipeline integrity |

## Interaction Model

Alert fires вҶ’ Incident Commander triages вҶ’ assigns tasks вҶ’ Watchdog verifies fix вҶ’ Commander closes.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Alert / PD   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  Incident Commander  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (trigger)    в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ  (incident-responder)в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                   в”Ӯ
                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                    v                             v
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ  Data Watchdog  в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ  Human Escalationв”Ӯ
          в”Ӯ  (flight-scraperв”Ӯ          в”Ӯ  (P0 only)       в”Ӯ
          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                   в”Ӯ
                   v
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ  Verify + Close в”Ӯ
          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## When to use
- Your service runs in production and you need 24/7 automated first-response.
- You want to reduce alert fatigue by auto-resolving known failure patterns.
- You need structured RCA (root cause analysis) after every incident.

## Use Cases
- **API outage:** Watchdog detects high error rate вҶ’ Commander declares P1 вҶ’ auto-runbook executes вҶ’ verifies recovery.
- **Data pipeline stall:** Watchdog detects lag вҶ’ Commander escalates to data team вҶ’ monitors SLA.
- **False positive sweep:** Commander reviews alert history and suppresses noisy checks.

## Rules
- Every alert must be acknowledged within 5 minutes.
- P0 incidents always page a human in addition to automated response.
- Incidents cannot be closed without a verified health check passing.
- All actions are logged for post-incident review.

name: Content & Marketing Team
description: Collaborative team that research, writes, and distributes content across channels

members.role: Content Strategist вҖ” owns the editorial calendar and content direction
Technical Writer вҖ” produces long-form content, docs, and deep-dive articles

author: cerealskill
objective: Collaborative team that research, writes, and distributes content across channels
roster:
# ROSTER.md

## Team
Content & Marketing Team

## Objective
Research, produce, and distribute high-quality content that drives awareness and engagement. The team follows a research-then-execution pattern вҖ” strategy comes first, production second.

## Members

| Agent | Role | Responsibility |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `content-strategist` | Content Strategist | Owns editorial calendar, channel strategy, and content briefs |
| `docs-writer` | Technical Writer | Produces long-form articles, documentation, and deep-dive content |

## Interaction Model

Strategist briefs вҶ’ Writer drafts вҶ’ Strategist reviews вҶ’ Strategist distributes.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ    Content Strategist    в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ    Docs Writer     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (content-strategist)    в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ   (docs-writer)    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                             в”Ӯ draft ready
                                             v
                                  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                                  в”Ӯ    Content Strategist    в”Ӯ
                                  в”Ӯ    (review + publish)    в”Ӯ
                                  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## When to use
- Launching a new product, feature, or campaign that needs content across multiple formats.
- Publishing a technical blog post or documentation series.
- Running a content sprint with clear output targets.

## Use Cases
- **Product launch:** Strategist defines messaging вҶ’ Writer produces blog + docs вҶ’ Strategist schedules across channels.
- **SEO sprint:** Strategist identifies keyword gaps вҶ’ Writer produces optimized articles вҶ’ Strategist tracks rankings.
- **Documentation overhaul:** Writer audits existing docs вҶ’ proposes structure вҶ’ Strategist signs off вҶ’ Writer executes.

## Rules
- Every piece of content starts with a written brief.
- No content is published without strategist approval.
- All published content is tracked in the editorial calendar.
- Writer owns accuracy; Strategist owns tone and alignment.

name: Equipo Dev Full-Stack
description: Equipo de desarrollo de software de punta a punta que cubre requisitos, implementaciГіn, revisiГіn y release

members.role: Ingeniero LГӯder вҖ” escribe cГіdigo, revisa PRs y toma decisiones tГ©cnicas
Product Owner вҖ” define requisitos, prioriza el backlog y acepta entregables
Ingeniero de Release вҖ” gestiona CI/CD, infra y deploys a producciГіn

author: cerealskill
objective: Equipo de desarrollo de software de punta a punta que cubre requisitos, implementaciГіn, revisiГіn y release
roster:
# ROSTER.md

## Equipo
Equipo Dev Full-Stack

## Objetivo
Entregar features de software listas para producciГіn desde los requisitos hasta el deploy usando un pipeline con etapas definidas. Cada etapa tiene un dueГұo especГӯfico y debe pasar antes de avanzar.

## Miembros

| Agente | Rol | Responsabilidad |
|--------|-----|-----------------|
| `backend-engineer` | Ingeniero LГӯder | Escribe, revisa y refactoriza cГіdigo; dueГұo de las decisiones de arquitectura tГ©cnica |
| `product-owner` | Product Owner | Escribe specs y criterios de aceptaciГіn; gestiona el backlog; firma los entregables |
| `platform-engineer` | Ingeniero de Release | Gestiona CI/CD, provisioning de infra, deploys canary y rollbacks |

## Modelo de InteracciГіn

PO define вҶ’ Dev implementa вҶ’ SRE hace el release вҶ’ PO acepta.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Product Owner  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ Ingeniero LГӯder  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (requisitos)   в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ (cГіdigo + review)в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                   в”Ӯ PR merged
                                   v
                          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ Ingeniero de Release в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ (CI/CD + deploy)     в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                   в”Ӯ deployado
                                   v
                          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ  Product Owner   в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ  (aceptaciГіn)    в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## CuГЎndo usarlo
- Construyendo una feature nueva desde cero con etapas de ownership claras.
- Corriendo un sprint donde requisitos, desarrollo y ops son responsabilidades separadas.
- NecesitГЎs trazabilidad desde el spec hasta el deploy en producciГіn.

## Casos de Uso
- **Sprint de feature:** PO escribe stories вҶ’ Dev implementa вҶ’ SRE despliega a staging вҶ’ PO acepta вҶ’ SRE promueve a prod.
- **Hotfix:** Dev diagnostica y corrige вҶ’ SRE despliega el hotfix вҶ’ PO confirma la resoluciГіn.
- **Cambio de infra:** SRE propone вҶ’ Dev revisa el impacto вҶ’ SRE ejecuta con aprobaciГіn del PO.

## Reglas
- NingГәn cГіdigo llega a prod sin CI pasando.
- Se requiere aceptaciГіn del PO antes de cualquier promociГіn a producciГіn.
- SRE estГЎ de guardia 24h despuГ©s de cada deploy.
- Dev es dueГұo del code review вҖ” sin auto-merges sin revisiГіn.

name: Equipo On-Call
description: Escuadra de respuesta a incidentes que detecta, clasifica y resuelve problemas de producciГіn con mГӯnima intervenciГіn humana

members.role: Comandante de Incidente вҖ” dueГұo del ciclo de vida del incidente y coordinador de la respuesta
Vigilante de Datos вҖ” monitorea pipelines de datos y health checks de APIs externas

author: cerealskill
objective: Escuadra de respuesta a incidentes que detecta, clasifica y resuelve problemas de producciГіn con mГӯnima intervenciГіn humana
roster:
# ROSTER.md

## Equipo
Equipo On-Call

## Objetivo
Detectar, clasificar y resolver incidentes de producciГіn de forma automГЎtica вҖ” escalando a humanos solo cuando es necesario. Este equipo opera 24/7 y sigue un ciclo de vida de incidentes estructurado para minimizar el MTTR.

## Miembros

| Agente | Rol | Responsabilidad |
|--------|-----|-----------------|
| `incident-responder` | Comandante de Incidente | DueГұo del ciclo de vida: declara, coordina, delega y cierra incidentes |
| `flight-scraper` | Vigilante de Datos | Monitorea fuentes externas, health checks de API e integridad de pipelines |

## Modelo de InteracciГіn

Alerta вҶ’ Comandante clasifica вҶ’ asigna tareas вҶ’ Vigilante verifica la soluciГіn вҶ’ Comandante cierra.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Alerta / PD    в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  Comandante de Incidente в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (disparador)   в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ  (incident-responder)    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                      в”Ӯ
                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                    v                                   v
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ              в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ Vigilante Datos  в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ EscalaciГіn Humanaв”Ӯ
          в”Ӯ (flight-scraper) в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ (solo P0)        в”Ӯ
          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ              в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                   в”Ӯ
                   v
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ Verificar y Cerrarв”Ӯ
          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## CuГЎndo usarlo
- Tu servicio estГЎ en producciГіn y necesitГЎs respuesta automГЎtica 24/7.
- QuerГ©s reducir la fatiga de alertas resolviendo automГЎticamente patrones conocidos.
- NecesitГЎs RCA estructurado despuГ©s de cada incidente.

## Casos de Uso
- **CaГӯda de API:** Vigilante detecta alta tasa de errores вҶ’ Comandante declara P1 вҶ’ ejecuta runbook automГЎtico вҶ’ verifica recuperaciГіn.
- **Pipeline detenido:** Vigilante detecta retraso вҶ’ Comandante escala al equipo de datos вҶ’ monitorea SLA.
- **Limpieza de falsos positivos:** Comandante revisa historial de alertas y suprime checks ruidosos.

## Reglas
- Toda alerta debe ser reconocida en menos de 5 minutos.
- Los incidentes P0 siempre notifican a un humano ademГЎs de la respuesta automГЎtica.
- No se puede cerrar un incidente sin un health check verificado.
- Todas las acciones se registran para revisiГіn post-incidente.

roster:
# ROSTER.md

## Equipo
Equipo Contenido y Marketing

## Objetivo
Investigar, producir y distribuir contenido de alta calidad que impulse el conocimiento y el engagement. El equipo sigue un patrГіn investigaciГіn-ejecuciГіn вҖ” la estrategia primero, la producciГіn despuГ©s.

## Miembros

| Agente | Rol | Responsabilidad |
|--------|-----|-----------------|
| `content-strategist` | Estratega de Contenido | DueГұo del calendario editorial, estrategia de canales y briefs de contenido |
| `docs-writer` | Redactor TГ©cnico | Produce artГӯculos long-form, documentaciГіn y contenido en profundidad |

## Modelo de InteracciГіn

Estratega hace el brief вҶ’ Redactor hace el draft вҶ’ Estratega revisa вҶ’ Estratega distribuye.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Estratega de Contenidoв”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ   Redactor TГ©cnico   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (brief + direcciГіn)   в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ   (draft contenido)  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                            в”Ӯ draft listo
                                            v
                                в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                                в”Ӯ  Estratega de Contenidoв”Ӯ
                                в”Ӯ  (revisiГіn + publicar) в”Ӯ
                                в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## CuГЎndo usarlo
- Lanzando un nuevo producto, feature o campaГұa que necesita contenido en mГәltiples formatos.
- Publicando un post tГ©cnico o una serie de documentaciГіn.
- Corriendo un sprint de contenido con objetivos de output claros.

## Casos de Uso
- **Lanzamiento de producto:** Estratega define el mensaje вҶ’ Redactor produce blog + docs вҶ’ Estratega programa en canales.
- **Sprint SEO:** Estratega identifica gaps de keywords вҶ’ Redactor produce artГӯculos optimizados вҶ’ Estratega rastrea rankings.
- **RenovaciГіn de docs:** Redactor audita la documentaciГіn existente вҶ’ propone estructura вҶ’ Estratega aprueba вҶ’ Redactor ejecuta.

## Reglas
- Todo contenido comienza con un brief escrito.
- NingГәn contenido se publica sin aprobaciГіn del estratega.
- Todo el contenido publicado se registra en el calendario editorial.
- El Redactor es dueГұo de la precisiГіn; el Estratega es dueГұo del tono y la alineaciГіn.
